{{Quote|I know myself to be only as I appear to myself.|Jhaveek|<ref name="Death Star (novel)">[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]</ref>}}
'''Jhaveek''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mrlssi]] [[Philosopher/Legends|philosopher]]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Nova Stihl]] studied Jhaveek's dissertations on [[Wikipedia:metaphysics|metaphysics]] while stationed on [[Despayre]].
